meta.tournament: YONEX All England Open Badminton Championships 2022

rallies.pat3: net shot → net shot → net shot
net shot → net shot → short serve

notes.title: An Se Young's net shot was his biggest weapon
notes.body: 6 of his 14 outright winners came from the net shot. Expect it — and train the counter.

notes.title: Akane Yamaguchi's errors were mostly unforced (92%)
notes.body: 12 of his 13 pressure-rated errors came from a comfortable position (<2.5 m/s required movement). These are free points to claw back — focus errors, not fitness.

notes.title: Akane Yamaguchi bled points on the net shot
notes.body: 4 points lost to net shot errors (1 into the net, 0 out). The single biggest fix available.

notes.title: Akane Yamaguchi's net shot was his biggest weapon
notes.body: 4 of his 12 outright winners came from the net shot. Expect it — and train the counter.

notes.title: An Se Young's errors were mostly unforced (74%)
notes.body: 14 of his 19 pressure-rated errors came from a comfortable position (<2.5 m/s required movement). These are free points to claw back — focus errors, not fitness.

notes.title: The “net shot → lift” exchange favored An Se Young
notes.body: This ending sequence appeared 4 times and An Se Young took 3 of them. Recognize the setup shot and break the pattern early.
